prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-FOLDINGSLUICEBOX-SLV Product Type: OUTDOOR_LIVING Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 50" Gold Sluice Box Folding Aluminum Prospecting Equipment Description: Pan for gold anywhere, anytime with the ASR Outdoor Backpack Folding Gold Sluice Box for gold prospecting. Extremely portable, folding down in size simply by loosening the connecting wing nuts, it will pack right up into your backpack. You're ready to prospect for gold right out of the package with woven vinyl miners moss included and installed.

Simplify your gold prospecting and mining with the ASR Outdoor aluminum folding gold sluice box.

This lightweight, aluminum folding sluice box incorporates traditional tried and true design aspects in an elongated 50" run out, with a large wide mouth flare opening. What makes this unit different and extra handy is the ability to fold up to just 15 inches tall by 12 inches wide, easily fitting into a backpack or 5 gallon bucket that is ideal for all day hikers, adventurers, and seasoned miner 49ers. You can backpack this folding sluice into remote areas anywhere!

The sluice box body is designed to lock rigidly in place when the sluice is unfolded. This takes care of the most common complaint about similar cheaper models in that they would often fold up when you tried to pick them up out of the stream.

The sluice box riffles feature Uni-Body construction, the riffles are precision laser cut from a single piece of 18 gauge steel and then formed into ultra light, sturdy steel riffles. These are then zinc plated for long, rust-free service.

Due to its simplicity and portability, this is a great gold recovery sluice box for beginners and serious prospecting enthusiasts alike. Search Terms: gold mining equipment pay dirt gold panning kit for adult sluce boxes for gold pan prospecting river stream sluic sifting screen classifier set cheap hog gold mat dredge highbanker prospector claim gifts dad modular classifier beginner Features: - PORTABLE DESIGN: Sluice box folds down compact for easy storage and carrying. You can backpack this gold sluice box into remote areas or even carry it inside a 5 gallon bucket - EFFORTLESS USE: All you need to do is make sure your sluice box is sloped well and level side to side while in use. When extended in stream, the sluice box body is designed to lock rigidly in place so that it does not fold up and collapse without warning - HIGH-YIELD GOLD RECOVERY: 18 gauge steel zinc-plated riffles are built in throughout the sediment channel trapping gold flake and small gold nuggets in the woven vinyl miners moss which is pre-installed and ready to use out of the box - DURABLE CONSTRUCTION: Made to be used; designed to be portable; the folding backpack sluice box for gold prospecting is lightweight made from highly durable, rust-free aluminum. It will surly withstand the harshest environments - SLUICE BOX SPECIFICATIONS: Extended Dimensions: 50 inch length; Folded Dimensions: 15 x 9 x 5 inches; Wide-Mouth Flange: 13.25 inches; Channel Wall: 3.5 inches; Weight: 8.4 lbs; Comes with carpet, woven vinyl miners moss and shoulder strap === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 50" Gold Sluice Box Folding Aluminum
